{
  "claims": [
    "The Pajaro River Flood Risk Management Project will bring significant flood protection to the city of Watsonville and nearby Central Coast communities.",
    "The project was made possible through a historic pact and is expected to be completed years earlier due to funding from the state.",
    "The project aims to increase flood protection from more extreme flood events.",
    "Pajaro’s levee and waterway system underwent extensive damage in March 2023 due to devastating storms.",
